mod-description.minime: Adjust the size of your character -- and change your appearance at any time if you've other mods that provide extra characters!

mod-setting-name.minime_scale-reach_resource_distance: Scale mining distance with character size
mod-setting-name.minime_scale-tool-attack-distance: Scale melee attack distance with character size
mod-setting-name.minime_character-size: Scaling factor for character size (in percent)
mod-setting-name.minime_show-character-removal-buttons: Show buttons for god and editor mode
mod-setting-name.minime_followmode: Player position when returning to character mode
mod-setting-name.minime_debug_to_log: Write debugging output to log file
mod-setting-name.minime_debug_to_game: Print debugging output to game chat

mod-setting-description.minime_character-selector: Change your appearance on the fly during the game, or toggle editor/god mode!\nPlease note: You will need at least one other mod that provides a new character skin. If the character you want isn't available for selection, ask the author of the mod providing it to add compatibility with "minime"!
mod-setting-description.minime_show-character-removal-buttons: You must have admin status to get the buttons for entering god or editor mode! In singleplayer games, you always are the admin; in multiplayer games, you're probably not.
mod-setting-description.minime_small-character-collision-box: Minimizing the collision box of characters allows you to squeeze through forests or move more easily between assemblers etc.
mod-setting-description.minime_followmode: When you exit editor or god mode, you will be reattached to the last character you've used. Here you can set whether you will be moved back to the location of your last character, or whether the character will be moved to your current location.
mod-setting-description.minime_debug_to_log: If you experience a crash, please enable this setting, try to reproduce the crash, and post the log file!\nWarning: This will enable excessive logging, so you should turn logging off unless it's really needed.
mod-setting-description.minime_debug_to_game: Warning: This will print insane amounts of debugging output to the game chat! You should only enable this if you want to help debugging a problem.
mod-setting-description.minime_remove-armor-animations: If enabled, the armor animations will be removed from all characters. You can still use armors, but they will not change the characters' appearance.
mod-setting-description.minime_icon-scheme: Choose the icon scheme that will be used for the toggle button and shortcuts! This is just for optics and has no effect on how the mod is working.

string-mod-setting-description.minime_followmode-character_follows_play: Warning: Combat bots will stop following the character when it's moved to another surface!

minime-GUI.toggle-char-selector-button-tooltip: Change your character skin or enter editor/god mode
minime-GUI.available-list-disable-all-button-toolti: The default character will always be available!
minime-GUI.available-list-toggle-all-button-tooltip: The default character will always be available!
minime-GUI.available-list-apply-changes-tooltip: There are pending changes!\nThe character selector won't be updated until you have applied them. Pending changes will be stored when this window is closed, so you can apply them when you open it again.
minime-GUI.available-list-close-button-tooltip: You can apply the pending changes next time you open this window!
minime-GUI.available-list-disabled-checkbox-tooltip: You can't disable your current character!
minime-GUI.disabled-button-tooltip-single-button: No other character is available! You can only use this button to exit editor or god mode.
minime-GUI.disabled-button-tooltip: Use the green button to change your appearance!
minime-GUI.disabled-button-tooltip-plural: Use one of the green buttons to change your appearance!
minime-GUI.disabled-removal-button-tooltip: Use the green button to return to character mode!
minime-GUI.disabled-removal-button-tooltip-plural: Use one of the green buttons to return to character mode!

minime-commands.command-minime-show-active-events-help: [color=yellow]Usage: /__1__\nPrint and log list of events the mod is listening to[/color]
minime-commands.command-minime-is-event-active-help: [color=yellow]Usage: /__1__ [number or event name]\nCheck whether the mod is listening to the specified event[/color]
minime-commands.command-minime-uninstall-help: [color=yellow]Usage: /__1__ (Can only be used by admins!)\nSwitch character of all players in character mode to default character. Remove all miniMAXIme guis. Remove all surfaces for dummy and preview characters. Disable all event handlers.[/color]

minime-command-errors.uninstall-not-admin: You must be admin to use this command!

minime-selector-mode.disabled-no-char-scenario: Scenario "__1__" from mod "__2__" doesn't support characters.
